description: ApiDapp appears to provide an API for querying Ethereum blockchain data and account/block/transaction information. The publicly discoverable integration surface is a single REST API described by machine-readable OpenAPI documents.
summary: apidapp.com exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the ApiDapp REST API at `https://ethereum.apidapp.com/1`, with published OpenAPI/Swagger specs; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
